description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, test, and deploy. In the build stage add a job named "build the package" that runs on npm runners, executes `npm install`, and is excluded from tag pipelines. In the test stage add a job named "execute npm tests" that runs on npm runners, executes `npm install` then `npm test`, and also excludes tag pipelines. In the deploy stage add a job named "publish coveralls" that runs on npm runners, allows failure, runs `npm install`, `npm run-script test-and-cover`, then sets the environment variables `COVERALLS_SERVICE_NAME="GitLab CI"`, `COVERALLS_GIT_COMMIT=${CI_BUILD_REF}`, `COVERALLS_GIT_BRANCH=${CI_BUILD_REF_NAME}`, `COVERALLS_REPO_TOKEN=${COVERALLS_REPO_TOKEN}` and finally runs `npm run-script publish-coveralls`; this job is also excluded from tag pipelines.
